# postgresql_roles (Data Source)

Lists PostgreSQL roles with optional filtering.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `like_pattern` (String) A SQL LIKE pattern to filter role names.
- `login_only` (Boolean) Whether to only include roles with LOGIN privilege. Default: false.
- `not_like_pattern` (String) A SQL NOT LIKE pattern to exclude role names.

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Attributes List) List of roles matching the filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `connection_limit` (Number) Connection limit for the role. -1 means no limit.
- `create_database` (Boolean) Whether the role can create databases.
- `create_role` (Boolean) Whether the role can create other roles.
- `login` (Boolean) Whether the role can log in.
- `name` (String) The name of the role.
- `oid` (Number) The OID of the role.
- `replication` (Boolean) Whether the role can initiate streaming replication.
- `superuser` (Boolean) Whether the role is a superuser.
